meta.title: Mohammed Ahmed | Computer Engineer & IT Support Engineer
meta.description: Portfolio of Mohammed Ahmed — Computer Engineer and IT Support Engineer specializing in networking, systems administration and cybersecurity.

hero.name: Mohammed Ahmed
hero.rolePrefix: I build reliable IT infrastructure as a
hero.description: Building reliable IT infrastructure and modern software solutions — from enterprise networks and Active Directory environments to full-stack web applications.

about.title: The engineer behind the infrastructure
about.bio: I'm a Computer Engineer specializing in IT support and infrastructure. I enjoy solving complex problems, automating repetitive tasks, and building systems that stay reliable under pressure — from enterprise networks and Active Directory domains to full-stack web applications.

journey.title: Graduated
journey.description: Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering, focused on networks, systems and software development.

journey.title: IT Internship
journey.description: Hands-on experience in IT support, system administration and enterprise networking at a university networking department.

journey.title: IT Support Engineer
journey.description: Working at NAQUA Company as an IT Support Engineer, maintaining infrastructure, resolving incidents and improving system reliability.

journey.title: Future goal
journey.description: Growing into a Cloud & Cybersecurity Engineer role — building secure, scalable and resilient solutions.

skillsSection.title: Skills & technologies
skillsSection.subtitle: A practical toolkit built across networking, systems administration, cybersecurity and full-stack development.

experienceSection.title: Experience
experienceSection.subtitle: A steady path from hands-on networking labs to production IT support.

points: Deliver first- and second-line IT support across networking, systems and end-user infrastructure.
Administer Active Directory, Microsoft 365 and Windows Server environments for the organization.
Maintain and monitor internal network infrastructure, reducing recurring downtime through proactive fixes.
Document processes and train staff on IT best practices and security hygiene.
Assisted in the design and maintenance of the university's core networking infrastructure.
Configured and troubleshot switches, routers and DHCP/DNS services in lab environments.
Supported staff and students with hardware, software and connectivity issues.
Built internal automation scripts to speed up recurring administrative tasks.
Graduated with a focus on computer networks, systems architecture and software engineering.
Completed a graduation project combining embedded systems with AI-driven interaction.
Active member of the university's networking and technology student community.

achievements: Reduced average IT ticket resolution time through structured triage and documentation.
Designed and deployed a full Active Directory lab environment used for internal training.
Built internal automation tooling that removed hours of manual, repetitive work every week.
Earned 8 professional certifications across networking, cloud and IT service management.

labSection.title: IT Lab & practical work
labSection.subtitle: Infrastructure I've personally deployed, broken, and fixed again in lab and production environments.

projectsSection.title: Featured projects
projectsSection.subtitle: A mix of infrastructure labs, automation tools and full-stack applications.
projectsSection.noResults: No projects match this filter yet.

windows-server-lab.title: Windows Server Lab
windows-server-lab.description: A complete Windows Server 2022 environment with Active Directory, DNS, DHCP and Group Policy management, built to mirror a real enterprise domain.

active-directory-lab.title: Active Directory Lab
active-directory-lab.description: Designed and implemented a multi-tier Active Directory environment following security and organizational-unit best practices.

network-monitoring.title: Network Monitoring Dashboard
network-monitoring.description: A real-time monitoring setup for network devices and servers, with alerting for downtime, latency spikes and abnormal traffic.

tiktok-downloader-bot.title: TikTok Downloader Bot
tiktok-downloader-bot.description: A Python automation bot that fetches and downloads TikTok videos without watermarks via a simple chat interface.

ai-hologram-project.title: AI Hologram Teacher
ai-hologram-project.description: A Raspberry Pi hologram using the Pepper's Ghost technique, paired with AI-driven voice interaction — my graduation project.

laravel-dashboard.title: Laravel Portfolio Dashboard
laravel-dashboard.description: A full-stack admin dashboard for managing portfolio content — projects, certificates and messages — built with Laravel and MySQL.

certificatesSection.title: Certificates
certificatesSection.subtitle: Professional certifications across networking, cloud platforms and IT service management.

ccna.title: CCNA
ccna.description: Cisco Certified Network Associate — routing, switching and network fundamentals.

itil4.title: ITIL 4 Foundation
itil4.description: IT service management foundations and best practices.

comptia-a.title: CompTIA A+
comptia-a.description: Core hardware, software and troubleshooting certification.

google-it.title: Google IT Support
google-it.description: Professional Certificate in IT support fundamentals.

contactSection.title: Let's build something reliable
contactSection.subtitle: Have a project in mind, or want to talk infrastructure, security or automation? I'd love to hear from you.
